rationale: A grid of 196 identical graphite dots fills the upper 2/3 (the herd of competitors). One dot in the middle is larger and red — the differentiator. Below, 400px uppercase GET / DIFFERENT title weight 500. In a market of identical offerings, being different is the only strategy.
